sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Fidelity National hands investors $500M in F&G stock, still keeps 70%
feed.summary: Fidelity National Financial (FNF) reported Q4 and full-year 2025 results, revealing a special stock distribution of approximately 12% of F&G (worth around $500 million) to its shareholders while retaining about 70% ownership. The company posted a Q4 net loss of $(117) million due to a $471 million noncash deferred tax charge related to this distribution. Despite the net loss, both the Title and F&G segments demonstrated strong operational performance with increased revenue, record assets under management, and significant capital returns to shareholders for the full year 2025.

feed.title: Select Water Solutions plans $175M underwritten offering, 30-day option for $26.25M
feed.summary: Select Water Solutions (WTTR) announced a plan for a $175 million underwritten public offering of Class A common stock. Underwriters have a 30-day option to purchase an additional $26.25 million in shares, potentially increasing the total raise. The company intends to use the net proceeds for water infrastructure growth projects, potential acquisitions, or debt repayment.

feed.title: Boyd Gaming (BYD) Boosts Quarterly Dividend to 20 Cents per Shar
feed.summary: Boyd Gaming (BYD) has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to 20 cents per share, up from 18 cents, with payment scheduled for April 15. The company, a diversified gaming operator, exhibits strong financial health with robust revenue growth, high profitability margins, and a low bankruptcy risk, despite mixed valuation metrics and recent insider selling. Its strategic multi-jurisdictional presence and efficient operations provide a solid foundation for continued growth.

feed.title: Waste Management and Recovery Services Market Report 2026: Opportunities Driven by Rising Urban Waste, Increasing Sustainable Practices, Government Investments in Recycling, and AI Technology Adoptio
feed.summary: The waste management and recovery services market is projected to reach $252.96 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 5.5% from $193.49 billion in 2025. This growth is driven by rising urban waste, sustainable practices, government investments in recycling, and AI adoption. Key players include Suez Environment SA, Veolia Environment SA, and Waste Management Inc., with North America leading the market.

feed.title: Wall Street Bullish on Huntington Bancshares (HBAN), Here's Why
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts hold a positive outlook on Huntington Bancshares (HBAN), with a 12-month price target indicating over 21% upside. Analysts from Truist Financial and Morgan Stanley have reiterated Buy ratings, though they have slightly lowered EPS forecasts for 2026 and 2027 due to reduced purchase accounting accretion and lower provision for acquired assets from recent acquisitions. Despite these adjustments, the company is expected to meet revenue goals through core fee growth and synergies.

feed.title: Vistra (VST) Increases Quarterly Dividend by 0.4%
feed.summary: Vistra Corp. (VST) has announced a 0.4% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.228 per share, resulting in a forward yield of 0.53%. Despite this dividend growth and a strong market position as a major power producer in the USA, the company faces financial vulnerabilities, including a distressing Altman Z-Score and significant insider selling. Its valuation metrics indicate a potentially overvalued stock, urging caution for investors despite a moderate buy recommendation from analysts.

feed.title: Incyte Corp. (INCY) Reports Q4 2025 Revenue Growth of 28% to $1.51B Driven by Jakafi and Opzelura Sales
feed.summary: Incyte Corporation reported a significant 28% increase in Q4 2025 revenue, reaching $1.51 billion, with full-year sales at $5.14 billion, primarily fueled by strong sales of Jakafi and Opzelura. The company's core business, excluding Jakafi, grew by 53% year-over-year in the final quarter, driven by its hematology and oncology franchise. Incyte aims to nearly double its business size through innovation and strategic development, focusing on next-gen treatments and expecting continued core business growth in 2026.

feed.title: ISRG Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ) pre-market $499.53 on 20 Feb 2026: AI-enabled devices guide outlook
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) trades pre-market at $499.53, slightly down, as investors weigh its leading position in robotic-assisted surgery against its premium valuation. Despite trading below its 50 and 200-day averages, the company maintains strong fundamentals and R&D investment in AI-driven healthcare. Meyka AI gives ISRG a "BUY" rating with a 12-month price target of $604.32, seeing significant upside potential amidst some short-term volatility and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Scotiabank Maintains Outperform on FirstEnergy (FE) Feb 19, 2026
feed.summary: Scotiabank maintained an "Outperform" rating on FirstEnergy (FE) and slightly increased its price target from $55 to $56 on February 19, 2026. This adjustment signals continued analyst confidence after the company's recent earnings and regulatory updates, rather than a dramatic shift in outlook. Investors should consider this affirmation alongside other fundamental analysis and market trends.

feed.title: Toyota set to launch all-new RAV4 PHEV in Japan
feed.summary: Toyota Motor Corporation has announced the official launch of its all-new RAV4 plug-in hybrid (PHEV) SUV in Japan on March 9, following the hybrid electric vehicle (HEV) model's December 2025 release. The new PHEV features an energy-efficient Series Parallel Plug-in Hybrid System with a 2.5L engine, offering a maximum power output of 242 kW and an increased BEV driving range of 150 km. Available in two variants, the Z PHEV and GR Sport PHEV, Toyota aims for a domestic sales target of 700 units per month.

feed.title: Alibaba, Baidu Shares Fall After Brief Inclusion in Pentagon Blocklist
feed.summary: Alibaba and Baidu shares experienced sharp declines after being briefly and then immediately withdrawn from a U.S. Pentagon blocklist due to alleged military ties. This incident caused significant market volatility, especially in Hong Kong, highlighting investor sensitivity to geopolitical headlines and U.S.-China tensions. Despite the companies' strong denials and ongoing technological advancements in AI, the event underscores the critical role of geopolitical risk in evaluating Chinese tech stocks.

feed.title: Pre Market: TRNR Interactive Strength NASDAQ +4.84% Feb 2026: Ergatta adds $30.00M
feed.summary: TRNR stock surged 4.84% in pre-market trading after Interactive Strength Inc. announced its acquisition of Ergatta, a game-based connected fitness company. The deal is expected to boost 2026 pro forma revenue above $30.00M USD, with Ergatta contributing over $10.00M USD in subscription-based revenue. Despite the positive market reaction, Meyka AI rates TRNR as a "HOLD" due to its small market cap, negative operating cash flow, and high leverage, emphasizing the high risk involved for traders.

feed.title: Duke Energy’s Quiet Re?Rating: Defensive Stock or Value Trap for 2025?
feed.summary: Duke Energy (NYSE:DUK), one of the largest regulated utilities in the US, is highlighted as a defensive play offering a steady dividend and modest upside, appealing to investors seeking income and stability. The article discusses how the company's performance is tied to interest rates, regulatory environments in high-growth states, and capital spending on grid modernization and renewables. While analysts see DUK as fairly valued, not cheap, its role as a core holding for yield and stability, particularly in income-oriented portfolios, remains intact despite ongoing regulatory risks and the complexities of the clean energy transition.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Reaffirms RTX Corp (RTX) Outperform on Pentagon Missile Manufacturing Framework Deal
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has reaffirmed its Outperform rating for RTX Corporation (RTX) with a $235 price target, following a deal between RTX and the Pentagon to boost missile manufacturing. The SM-3IB missile program, previously at risk, is now expected to see tripled production, potentially adding $7-8 billion in revenue to RTX’s Raytheon division. This agreement could lead to a 25% implied growth over the 2025 run-rate and increase the segment's compound annual growth rate.

feed.title: NRG Energy (NRG) Expands Portfolio With LS Power Asset Acquisition
feed.summary: NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) has completed the acquisition of several generation assets and CPower from LS Power, expanding its portfolio with 18 natural gas-powered facilities and CPower's virtual power plant system. This acquisition led to a revision of NRG's 2026 financial outlook, including updated adjusted net income and EPS guidance. The company, a major integrated U.S. energy provider, is also recognized as one of billionaire David Tepper’s top stock picks.

feed.title: Costamare Inc. Sets Date for Q4 2025 Results Release
feed.summary: Costamare Inc., a major containership owner, announced it will release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results on February 18, 2026, before market open. The company will host a conference call and webcast on the same day at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss these results. This announcement is significant for investors and analysts monitoring the global shipping industry and international trade.

feed.title: Benchmark Sees Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Generating Tens of Billions in AI Revenue by 2027
feed.summary: Benchmark reiterated its Buy rating and $325 price target for Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), highlighting the company's strong position in the expanding AI data center market. The firm projects AMD could generate "tens of billions of annual AI revenue in 2027" and suggests its partnership with OpenAI alone offers "well over $100 billion of revenue potential." Benchmark also noted client demand for alternatives to Nvidia's dominant architecture, positioning AMD favorably.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Reaffirms RTX Corp (RTX) Outperform on Pentagon Missile Manufacturing Framework Deal
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has reaffirmed its Outperform rating for RTX Corporation with a $235 price target, following a deal between RTX and the Pentagon to boost missile manufacturing. The SM-3IB missile program, previously facing cuts, could see production triple, potentially adding $7-8 billion in revenue for RTX's Raytheon division. This projected increase represents a 25% implied growth compared to the 2025 run-rate, with a possible "couple percent upside pressure" on the segment's current 6% compound annual growth rate.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment unveils first proprietary online slot
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment has launched its first proprietary online slot game, Ca$hline, developed by its in-house studio Empire Creative. This three-reel stepper slot, featuring a "Land It, Win It" format, is currently exclusive to Caesars' online casinos in New Jersey and plans are in place for expansion to other jurisdictions. The game aims to offer players meaningful choices and a blend of classic gameplay with innovative features.

feed.title: CORT (-14%): Korlym Patent Defeat Unlocks Generic Threat
feed.summary: The article discusses the patent defeat of Korlym, a drug produced by CORT, which has led to a significant 14% drop in the company's stock value. This defeat opens the door for generic competition, posing a threat to CORT's market position. The content itself seems to be a placeholder or incomplete, focusing more on Trefis platform details than the actual financial implications of the patent defeat.

feed.title: PG&E Corporation (PCG) Gaining After FQ4 2025 Earnings, Here’s What You Should Know
feed.summary: PG&E Corporation (PCG) saw its stock gain over 5% following its fiscal Q4 2025 earnings release on February 12, 2026. The company reported $6.80 billion in revenue, a 2.61% year-over-year growth, although it missed expectations. With analysts maintaining positive outlooks and the company raising its 2026 earnings guidance, PCG continues to show strong financial performance.

feed.title: Citi Lowers PT on Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (HPE)
feed.summary: Citi has lowered its price target on Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (HPE) from $28 to $26, maintaining a Buy rating, due to adjustments in its coverage of the hardware and storage sector ahead of Q4 earnings and mixed end-market demand. This contrasts with Goldman Sachs's earlier upgrade of HPE to Buy with a raised price target of $31, based on the transformative Juniper Networks acquisition expected to boost the Networking segment's revenue and EBIT. HPE is recognized for its high-performance computing and AI solutions, but the article suggests other AI stocks might offer better returns and lower risk.

feed.title: Wall Street Bullish on Huntington Bancshares (HBAN), Here’s Why
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts hold a positive outlook on Huntington Bancshares (HBAN), with 12-month price targets suggesting over 21% upside. Both Truist Financial and Morgan Stanley reiterated Buy ratings on the stock, though they revised EPS forecasts downwards for 2026 and 2027 due to reduced purchase accounting accretion from recent acquisitions. Despite these adjustments, the firms expect HBAN to meet its revenue goals, driven by core fee growth and synergies.

feed.title: VICI Properties (VICI) Among the Best Affordable Stocks Under $40
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. (VICI) is considered among the best affordable stocks under $40, despite a recent downgrade by Scotiabank due to concerns about growth and a lease agreement with Caesars Entertainment. Analysts generally maintain a positive outlook, with a significant upside potential reflected in their 12-month price targets. The company, a REIT owning gaming and hospitality destinations, is expected to release its Q4 2025 earnings soon.

feed.title: Here’s What the Street Thinks About AT&T Inc. (T)’s Lumen’s Mass Markets Fiber Business Acquisition
feed.summary: The article discusses Wall Street's mixed reactions to AT&T Inc.'s (T) acquisition of Lumen’s Mass Markets fiber business. RBC Capital reiterated a "Buy" rating and raised its price target to $31, citing the acquisition's strategic benefits for long-term growth and protection against wireless competition. Barclays, however, maintained a "Hold" rating with a $26 price target. The acquisition, valued at $5.75 billion, is expected to significantly expand AT&T's fiber subscriber base and infrastructure.

feed.title: Pfizer Inc (PFE) Announces Positive Results from BREAKWATER Trial
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. announced positive results from its BREAKWATER trial for BRAFTOVI in combination with cetuximab and FOLFIRI for metastatic colorectal cancer, showing significant improvement in progression-free survival and overall survival. Despite the positive trial results, some analysts have recently downgraded Pfizer, citing R&D investment risks, even as the company surpassed Q4 2025 earnings estimates. Pfizer plans to submit the detailed results to the FDA for regulatory consideration.

feed.title: Comcast Corporation (CMCSA) Reports Positive Results From Quantum Computing Trial
feed.summary: Comcast Corporation (CMCSA) has reported positive results from its quantum computing trial, conducted in collaboration with AMD and Classiq. The trial aims to demonstrate that quantum algorithms can enhance network reliability for internet delivery, proving the practical and scalable nature of quantum computing for network optimization. This news follows Comcast's fiscal Q4 2025 results, where the company reported a revenue increase of 1.24% year-over-year to $32.31 billion and an EPS of $0.84, exceeding consensus estimates.

feed.title: 2026 Toyota RAV4 PHEV Goes on Sale in Japan
feed.summary: Toyota has launched the 2026 RAV4 Plug-in Hybrid (PHEV) in Japan, featuring an extended 150 km EV range, 242 kW system output, and a new GR SPORT variant. The vehicle also serves as a mobile power source, capable of providing electricity for outdoor use and emergencies. This release reinforces Toyota's multi-pathway electrification strategy, offering advanced features and enhanced performance.

feed.title: CRH Re-Issues Treasury Shares to Satisfy Employee Performance Awards
feed.summary: CRH plc has re-issued over 2.3 million treasury shares to its Employee Benefit Trust at $124.75 per share. These shares are intended to satisfy vested awards under the 2014 Performance Share Plan, serving as equity-based compensation for employees. Following this transaction, CRH now holds approximately 35.7 million shares in treasury, with 670.3 million shares in issue, a routine adjustment to its capital structure reflecting its use of performance-linked share plans.

feed.title: Stratos Wealth Partners LTD. Cuts Stock Position in ALPS | Smith Core Plus Bond ETF $SMTH
feed.summary: Stratos Wealth Partners LTD. significantly reduced its stake in ALPS | Smith Core Plus Bond ETF (SMTH) by 71.7% in the third quarter, holding 11,687 shares valued at $306,000. Despite this, several other institutional investors increased their positions in SMTH. The ETF recently announced a monthly dividend of $0.0848, with an ex-dividend date of February 19th.

feed.title: Columbia Sportswear Statistics And Market Trends (2026)
feed.summary: The article details Columbia Sportswear's financial performance in 2025, highlighting a challenging but strategically active year. Despite macroeconomic headwinds, the company achieved $3.40 billion in revenue, reflecting 1% year-over-year growth, primarily driven by international markets which compensated for a decline in the U.S. Net income decreased by 21% to $177.2 million, but the company maintained operational stability through effective cost management, gross margin expansion, and strategic share buybacks.

feed.title: Snap-on Stock Near Record Highs: Durable Value or Late-Cycle Trap?
feed.summary: Snap-on Inc. (NYSE: SNA) is trading near all-time highs, driven by consistent earnings, resilient demand from professional mechanics, and share buybacks. The article discusses whether Snap-on's stock represents durable value or if it's overvalued at the top of the economic cycle, especially for U.S. investors. It highlights the company's strong fundamentals, including robust free cash flow and a consistent dividend, but also points to valuation concerns given its current premium trading levels.

feed.title: How Elevance Health Brings Sustainability into Healthcare
feed.summary: Elevance Health is committed to transforming healthcare delivery by integrating digital innovation and sustainability initiatives. The company aims for net-zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2030 and prioritizes renewable energy, while also using AI and data analytics to personalize care. Furthermore, Elevance Health emphasizes supply chain sustainability, requiring suppliers to meet ESG standards to strengthen operations and promote environmental stewardship.

feed.title: Citigroup Maintains Buy on KRMN Karman Holdings Inc Feb 19 2026
feed.summary: Citigroup maintained a "Buy" rating on Karman Holdings Inc (KRMN) on February 19, 2026, and initiated an "upside 90-day catalyst watch" following management meetings, without issuing a new price target. This action signals continued confidence in KRMN and highlights potential near-term operational events, driving a 3.33% stock increase. Given limited analyst coverage for Karman, this high-profile note from Citi is significant, and Meyka AI rates KRMN with a B+ grade based on various financial and market factors.

feed.title: Candel Therapeutics Prices $100 Mln Shares Offering At $5.45/shr To Advance Aglatimagene;Stock Down
feed.summary: Candel Therapeutics announced a public offering of 18.35 million common shares at $5.45 per share, aiming to raise $100 million to fund the advancement of aglatimagene besadenovec (CAN-2409) for prostate cancer and non-small cell lung cancer, as well as for general corporate purposes. The offering led to an 11.76% decrease in CADL stock price to $5.25. The company plans to use the proceeds for launch readiness, medical affairs, and pre-commercialization activities for aglatimagene, and for ongoing development costs of its phase 3 trial in NSCLC.

feed.title: TFI International Inc. (TFII) Receives Neutral Rating From B of A Securities
feed.summary: TFI International Inc. (TFII) has received a Neutral rating from Ken Hoexter at B of A Securities, with a price target of $123. The stock, currently trading at $116.27, shows mixed performance with a 14.98% quarterly increase but a 19.71% yearly decline. Analysts' consensus indicates cautious optimism, with 5 Buy recommendations and 6 Hold recommendations, suggesting investors should monitor market shifts and company developments.

feed.title: Telix (ASX:TLX) share price jumps 14% on 2026 revenue outlook — what moved the stock
feed.summary: Telix shares surged 14.2% after the company announced its 2025 full-year results, showing a 56% jump in revenue to US$803.8 million, and provided strong 2026 revenue guidance between US$950 million and US$970 million. The company also recently sought European approval for a brain cancer imaging product candidate, TLX101-Px. Despite a recent tough period for its stock, Telix is actively expanding its development pipeline and recalibrating investor expectations.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman Corp VP sells $547k in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kathryn G Simpson, VP & General Counsel of Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC), sold 779 shares of common stock for over $547,000. She also acquired shares through restricted stock rights and disposed of some for tax obligations. This sale comes as InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is overvalued, despite the company recently exceeding earnings expectations, securing new contracts, and declaring a dividend.

feed.title: Benchmark Maintains Buy on Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) Feb 19 2026
feed.summary: Benchmark reiterated a Buy rating on Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) on February 19, 2026, ahead of the company's Q4 results, citing confidence in management's outlook and revenue momentum. The decision to maintain the rating, without a new price target, signals continued analyst conviction in LYV's growth drivers despite a modest market reaction. Meyka AI gives LYV a B+ grade, suggesting a cautiously positive outlook for investors.

feed.title: Vodafone Buys Back 31.8 Million Shares for Treasury Holding
feed.summary: Vodafone Group Plc repurchased 31,840,026 ordinary shares on February 19, 2026, as part of its ongoing buyback program. These shares, bought from Goldman Sachs International at 115.42 pence each, will be held in treasury, reducing the free float and supporting the company's capital return strategy. This move brings Vodafone's treasury holding to 1,712,051,017 shares, with 23,165,909,740 ordinary shares remaining in issue.

feed.title: Delek Logistics Partners (DKL) Expected to Announce Quarterly Earnings on Friday
feed.summary: Delek Logistics Partners (DKL) is scheduled to release its Q4 2025 earnings before the market open on Friday, February 27, 2026. Analysts anticipate earnings of $1.26 per share and revenue of $283.64 million. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend to $1.125, resulting in an 8.4% annualized yield, and its shares opened at $53.85 with a market cap of $2.88 billion.

feed.title: Rafael Flores sells Ameren (AEE) stock worth $178,432
feed.summary: Rafael Flores, a director at Ameren (AEE), sold 1,600 shares of the company's common stock for $178,432 on February 17, 2026. This transaction occurred as the stock traded near its 52-week high, with Flores retaining 13,953 shares. The utility company has a market cap of $30.35 billion, a P/E ratio of 20.24, and offers a 2.73% dividend yield, though InvestingPro analysis suggests it is slightly overvalued.

feed.title: Teledyne Delivers Four GAVIA AUVs to Sweden & Modernizes Subsea Fleet
feed.summary: Teledyne Marine has delivered the first four GAVIA Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV) systems to the Swedish Defence Materiel Administration. This delivery is part of a multi-year agreement aimed at modernizing the Swedish Armed Forces' subsea capabilities and enhancing underwater surveillance. The modular design of the GAVIA AUVs allows for rapid reconfiguration to support various missions, including mine countermeasures, hydrography, and seabed mapping.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies Stock: Analyst Estimates & Ratings
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies (A) has underperformed the broader market and the healthcare sector over the past year and year-to-date, despite stable fundamentals and a positive long-term outlook. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock, with a consensus price target indicating a significant premium to current levels. The company's stock has faced downward pressure due to market concerns over global tariffs and supply chain issues, even as it continues to meet or exceed earnings expectations.

feed.title: Nexa resumes operations at Atacocha San Gerardo mine after protests
feed.summary: Nexa Resources has gradually resumed operations at its Atacocha San Gerardo open pit mine in Peru after protests by the Joraonivoc community ended. Despite a temporary disruption causing an estimated loss of 0.9 kilotons of zinc, which the company expects to recover, Nexa's 2026 production guidance remains unchanged. The company, a major polymetallic producer, operates mines and smelters in Peru and Brazil and emphasizes its commitment to safety and community dialogue.

feed.title: SS&C declares $0.27 dividend
feed.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings (NASDAQ: SSNC) recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.27 per share. The dividend is payable on March 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 1, 2026. This announcement highlights the company's commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

feed.title: Halliburton’s New Oilfield Play: What It Really Means For U.S. Energy
feed.summary: Halliburton's latest moves in oilfield services, focusing on digital drilling tools and AI optimization, are poised to significantly impact U.S. energy stability and affordability. The company's strategy emphasizes efficiency and high-margin U.S. shale work through disciplined pricing and advanced technology. These changes could influence gas prices, job markets, and the pace of the energy transition, making Halliburton a key, albeit quiet, player in the American energy landscape.

feed.title: Equitable Holdings’ Lane Nick sells $1.35m in stock
feed.summary: Nick Lane, President of Equitable Financial, sold 30,000 shares of Equitable Holdings Inc. (NYSE: EQH) for $1.35 million and exercised options for an additional 10,000 shares. This transaction leaves him with 107,875.8 direct shares. The company recently met EPS expectations for Q4 2025 but experienced a significant revenue shortfall, prompting close monitoring from investors and analysts.

feed.title: Qualcomm, Tata Electronics to manufacture Qualcomm Automotive Modules in India
feed.summary: Qualcomm Technologies and Tata Electronics have signed a pact for Tata Electronics to manufacture Qualcomm Automotive Modules in Assam, India. This collaboration aims to localize production of automotive technologies for digital cockpits, infotainment, connectivity, and intelligent vehicle systems, supporting both Indian and global automakers. Tata Electronics will join Qualcomm's global network of module manufacturing partners, enhancing supply chain flexibility and geographic diversification, aligned with the 'Make in India' initiative.

feed.title: Rick Smith’s Tasers and the Social-Control Economy
feed.summary: This article examines Axon Enterprise Inc. (formerly Taser International), its CEO Rick Smith, and the company's role in the social-control economy. It highlights criticisms of Taser safety, Axon's monopolistic practices, and its expansion into bodycam technology, AI-generated police reports, healthcare surveillance, and drone-based electroshock weapons. The piece raises concerns about privacy, bias in AI, and the growing surveillance infrastructure.
